name: __init__.py
summary: Empty package marker that makes the agents directory importable as a Python package.

name: .understandignore
summary: Ignore-list file used by the Understand-Anything tool to exclude paths from analysis.

name: bare_agent.py
summary: Baseline generic Pokemon TCG pilot with no archetype-specific logic; scores attacks, energy attachment, and bench decisions purely from the engine observation.

name: bare_agent2.py
summary: Near-identical variant of bare_agent.py providing a second baseline generic pilot for A/B comparison in the gauntlet.

name: fire.py
summary: Anti-Crustle Fire-type aggro pilot that exploits the opponent's Grass weakness; adds a heal-awareness helper on top of the generic scoring engine.

name: honchkrow.py
summary: Combo-aware Rocket's Honchkrow pilot whose Rocket Feathers attack damage scales with discarded ammo; the strongest hand-tuned anti-meta agent in the project.

name: main_bench.py
summary: Bench-focused variant of the main generic pilot that emphasizes bench-development heuristics in its decision scoring.

name: main_crustle_base.py
summary: Baseline pilot for the Crustle archetype deck, identical scaffold to main.py used as the Crustle-family reference point.

name: main_cur.py
summary: Current working main pilot variant, a snapshot of main.py used as the active comparison baseline.

name: main_honch_base.py
summary: Baseline (untuned) Honchkrow pilot using the generic scaffold, the starting point that honchkrow.py later improves with combo-aware damage.

name: main_megalucario_backup.py
summary: Backup of the original Mega Lucario pilot; the earliest deck strategy that later variants were benchmarked against and beat.

name: main_typh_base.py
summary: Baseline pilot for the Typhlosion archetype, the reference variant for the Crustle/Typhlosion two-line deck.

name: main_typhlosion.py
summary: Typhlosion archetype pilot (the main_v2 = Typhlosion deck); generic engine playing the Crustle/Typhlosion two-line deck.

name: main_v1.py
summary: First iteration of the evolving main pilot lineage; generic scoring engine that later versions (v2, v3, v4) build upon.

name: main_v2.py
summary: Second iteration pilot (the Typhlosion-deck generic engine) that proved strongest as an untuned generic pilot in the gauntlet.

name: main_v2_baseline.py
summary: Frozen baseline copy of main_v2 used as the control for measuring whether later tuning overlays improve or regress the gauntlet.

name: main_v2_rebel.py
summary: Experimental v2 overlay adding cheap-damage, energy-acceleration, and heal heuristics; an archetype-tuning branch off main_v2.

name: main_v3.py
summary: Third iteration pilot with full combo modeling: detects Ethan's Pokemon in discard and models Buddy Blast damage scaling plus hand/field awareness.

name: main_v3_pure.py
summary: Strongest pilot: the v2 generic engine plus only the pure Buddy Blast real-damage correction, deliberately omitting all regressing archetype overlays.

name: main_v4.py
summary: Fourth iteration pilot retaining the Ethan's-in-discard damage correction with a trimmed helper set compared to v3.

name: main.py
summary: Primary entry-point pilot for the project, currently running the Crustle-family generic decision engine that the other variants are benchmarked against.
